last_action: Fixed invoice status display bug where 'Draft' invoices appeared as 'Paid' to tenants.
summary: Phase 10: Bug Fixing and UX Translation. Resolved a critical logic error in the tenant-facing invoice template (bill.html) where 'Draft' status was defaulting to 'Paid' display. Added explicit handling for 'Draft', 'Paid', and unknown statuses. Updated the payment history view (history.html) with Thai translations for all invoice statuses and improved color coding for better user clarity.
next_steps: Verify the display of 'Draft' invoices in the tenant interface using a test case.
Check for any other hardcoded status strings in the tenant-facing templates.
Prepare for Phase 11: Final user acceptance testing and documentation updates.
